__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, links to the homepage, and matches the brand inferred from the URL and page title.

primary.reasoning: Button #7 ('Get Olive') uses the vibrant brand color #253612, which aligns with the site's primary call-to-action to engage users with the app.

secondary.reasoning: Button #2 ('Sign up for Olive today') has a different background color (#FFFFFF) and serves as a secondary action to encourage user registration.
